title: buddleja cordata subsp. ovandensis
intro: Buddleja cordata subsp. ovandensis, also known as the Ovandense Buddleja, is a plant species that belongs to the Buddlejaceae family and is native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Buddleja cordata subsp. ovandensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to leverage its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and benefits.
